description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure depicted in a casual, everyday urban outfit. The individual is wearing a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, with the shirt appearing loose-fitting and the shorts having a relaxed cut. The figure's arms are positioned naturally at the sides, and the legs are straight, suggesting a neutral, upright stance. The footwear is low-profile and athletic in style, suitable for walking or casual activity. The head is uncovered, and the hairstyle is short and neatly groomed. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions.
description: An adult pedestrian in a casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, standing upright with short hair and athletic shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the shirt's neckline, arm placement, and the front of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear of the shirt, shorts, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the arm and leg contours visible.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts in a casual style
